key_learnings: Identifying the top 14 major allergens and their hidden derivatives in ingredient lists.
research_findings: Cross-contamination risks are underreported on standard food labels.
current_focus_areas: Building a cross-reference database for allergen synonyms and hidden sources.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Compiled the top 14 major allergens and began building an allergen synonym cross-reference database. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: hidden allergen sources in processed foods
emerging allergens not yet in major 14 list
allergen labelling regulations across different countries
food allergy vs food intolerance distinctions
natural language processing for allergen synonym detection
clinical allergy threshold data for common allergens
collaboration_notes: Bot 4 actively asks Copilot for allergen detection topics. Copilot provides new research areas to expand the allergen cross-reference database. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
